mustHave.message: Add a UTF-8 charset meta tag.
Add a responsive viewport meta tag.

mustNotHave.message: Review iframe usage and remove it if it is not required.
Avoid eval() because it is unsafe and difficult to maintain.
Links opening in a new tab should include rel="noopener noreferrer".

custom.message: Buttons should have visible text or an accessible label.
Inputs should have a label or aria-label.
